_comment: Focus-block configuration for the weekly generator (spec Section 3.4 / SKILL.md Section 4). Blocks are CONFIGURED here, not hardcoded: name, length, days/week, tier, and session templates. Two concurrent blocks (skill + strength don't interfere). PROTECT strength percentages feed the deterministic load calc — no weights are written here. Spec-default blocks: 6-wk ring-MU skill block (3x/wk) + front-squat/strict-press strength emphasis (2x/wk, PROTECT). 'current_week' is early/mid block (normal week, not a deload). v1.1 policy: where the class already covers a PROTECT lift (heavy squats), defer the heavy stimulus to class and substitute the low-CNS 'complement' (quad/knee supporting work) appended to a non-clashing class day — never a competing barbell front squat. The per-template 'emphasis' line is where week-to-week drill focus is refined (point: 'refine what specific exercises to prioritise').

templates.name: Front Squat strength (paused)
templates.emphasis: Clean stand-up: 3s pause in the hole, stay vertical out of the front rack.
movements: Paused Front Squat (3s pause in the hole) — attacks the clean stand-up (recovery-limited)

complement.name: Quad / knee supporting work
complement.emphasis: Quad development + knee health — class already supplies the heavy squat stimulus this week.
movements: Bulgarian split squat — 3 x 8 / leg (controlled, full depth)
Zombie front squat — 3 x 5 (front-rack + quad/upright-torso bias)
Spanish squat (banded) — 3 x 20s holds (knee rehab / tendon health)

templates.name: Strict Press strength
templates.emphasis: Overhead press is the genuine weak link (SP 70 vs 80 goal) — class under-supplies it; this is the protected lift this week.

templates.name: Ring MU skill
templates.emphasis: This week's focus: false-grip strength + the transition turnover (chase frequency, not load).
skill_items: Ring MU transitions (low rings / feet assist) — 5 x 3
